title: Chewy Umami Slovakian Lamb Pilaf
description: A savory Slovakian dish featuring lamb, couscous, and umami flavors, perfect for a date night, this ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly recipe combines the richness of lamb with the comfort of couscous.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the dashi extract, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the couscous and stir to combine, cooking for 1 minute.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the couscous is tender.
Stir in the pitted dates and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
